title: galium album var. petraeum
intro: Galium album var. petraeum, also known as Alpine Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Galium album var. petraeum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help manage digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with its dried leaves and stems being used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties.
